name: Photography Header
description: Minimal clean header for photography portfolio
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
css: .header { padding: 1.5rem 0; background: #fff; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #666; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #111; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: Photography Hero
html:
{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{ctaText}}
css: .hero { height: 90vh; min-height: 500px; background: #111; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .hero-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.3), rgba(0,0,0,0.5)); display: flex; align-items: center; } .container { max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; width: 100%; } .hero-content { color: #fff; max-width: 600px; } .hero-title { font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.85; margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.6; } .btn-outline { display: inline-block; padding: 1rem 2rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; transition: all 0.2s; } .btn-outline:hover { background: #fff; color: #111; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { height: 70vh; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } }

subtitle.default: Fine art and commercial photography that transforms moments into timeless visual narratives.

name: Photography Gallery
html:
{{title}}

{{#each photos}}
{{title}}

{{title}}

{{category}}
{{/each}}
css: .gallery { padding: 4rem 0; background: #fff; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .gallery-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1rem; } .gallery-item { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .gallery-image { aspect-ratio: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s; } .gallery-item:hover .gallery-image { transform: scale(1.02); } .gallery-placeholder { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .gallery-info { padding: 1rem 0; } .gallery-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #111; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .gallery-category { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #999; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

name: Photography Services
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each services}}

{{title}}

{{description}}

{{price}}Inquire →
{{/each}}
css: .services { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fafafa; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { color: #666; max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .service-card { background: #fff; padding: 2.5rem; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #eee; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .service-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .service-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; color: #111; margin-bottom: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .service-desc { color: #666; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; line-height: 1.6; } .service-price { display: block; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: #c9a96e; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .service-link { color: #111; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Tailored photography packages for every occasion

default.title: Portrait Sessions
default.description: Professional headshots, family portraits, and personal branding photography.

default.title: Wedding Photography
default.description: Full-day coverage capturing every precious moment of your special day.

default.title: Commercial & Product
default.description: High-quality imagery for brands, products, and marketing campaigns.

name: Photography Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}{{role}}
{{/each}}
css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 2rem; } .testimonial-card { padding: 2rem; } .testimonial-text { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #333; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-style: italic; } .author-name { color: #111; display: block; } .author-role { color: #999; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

default.text: The photos exceeded every expectation. Each image tells a story and captures the emotion of the moment perfectly.
default.name: Sarah & James

default.text: Professional, creative, and incredibly easy to work with. The headshots transformed my personal brand completely.
default.name: Michael Torres

name: Photography CTA
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{buttonText}}
css: .cta { padding: 5rem 0; background: #111; color: #fff; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.8; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 1rem 2rem; background: #c9a96e; color: #111; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 3rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } }

description.default: Ready to book your session? Get in touch and let's plan your shoot.

name: Photography Contact Form
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .contact-form { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fafafa; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; margin-bottom: 2rem; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #666; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 0; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; background: transparent; font-size: 1rem; color: #111; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #c9a96e; } textarea.form-input { min-height: 100px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: #111; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-decoration: none; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .form-wrapper { padding: 0 1rem; } }

name: Photography Footer
html:
{{logo}}

{{description}}

css: .footer { padding: 3rem 0; background: #fff; border-top: 1px solid #eee; color: #666; } .footer-inner { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 300; color: #111; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; max-width: 250px; line-height: 1.6; } .footer-nav { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 1.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .footer-nav a { color: #666; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-nav a:hover { color: #111; } .footer-bottom { text-align: center; font-size: 0.75rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-inner { flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; } }

description.default: Fine art and commercial photography based in New York City.

copyright.default: © 2026 Lens & Light Photography. All rights reserved.
